title: aws-kms: RSA-PSS sign uses MessageType::Digest, rejected by KMS
description: Trigger: backend constructed with rsa-pss-2048, caller calls sign(message). Code pre-hashes with SHA-256 and passes MessageType::Digest to KMS. KMS RSASSA_PSS_SHA_256 does not accept MessageType::Digest — requires MessageType::Raw with the full message. KMS returns ValidationException at runtime. Fix: when algo_spec is RsassaPssSha256, pass raw message bytes with MessageType::Raw.
